title: Dungeon crawler world Schema.
description: Contains all properties used for json data files within the dungeon crawler world game.

prerequisites.description: This is a list of all the prerequisites needed to use this ability.

requirements.description: This is a list of all the requirements needed to unlock this ability.
requirements.$comment: This property is currently broken, and I am trying to get it working again as fast as possible.

abilities.description: This is a list of all the abilities available.

classes.description: This is the list of classes provided by the input or connected to the inputs.

sub_classes.description: This is the list of subclasses connected to the input classes.

description.description: This is the description of the thing.

type.description: This is the type of the thing.

oneOf.description: This is the level of the thing.
This allows for level descriptors like 'high' or 'low'.

level.description: This is the level of the thing.

name.description: This is the name of the thing.

range.description: This is the range of the ability.

duration.description: This is the duration of the ability.

cost.description: This is the cost of using the ability.

cooldown.description: This is the cooldown period for using the ability.
